meta.title: Sud Ouest Dental Clinic | Dentist in Montréal
meta.description: Sud Ouest Dental Clinic — general and cosmetic dental care in Montréal. Book your appointment online.
hero.title: Your smile, our passion
hero.subtitle: Exceptional dental care in a warm, modern environment in the heart of Montréal.
sameday.title: Same-day appointments available
sameday.desc: We understand that emergencies don't wait. Contact us for a quick appointment.
general.title: General Dentistry
general.subtitle: Comprehensive care for the whole family, in a comfortable and welcoming setting.
general.service1.title: Exam & Cleaning
general.service1.desc: Complete exams and professional cleanings to maintain your oral health.
general.service2.title: X-Rays
general.service2.desc: State-of-the-art digital imaging for accurate diagnostics.
general.service3.title: Fillings
general.service3.desc: Composite restorations for natural and lasting results.
general.service4.title: Crowns
general.service4.desc: Custom crowns to protect and restore your teeth.
divider.quote: "A smile is the best thing you can wear."
cosmetic.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
cosmetic.subtitle: Transform your smile with our cutting-edge aesthetic treatments.
cosmetic.service1.title: Invisalign
cosmetic.service1.desc: Straighten your teeth discreetly with clear aligners.
cosmetic.service2.title: Implants
cosmetic.service2.desc: Permanent, natural-looking solutions to replace missing teeth.
cosmetic.service3.title: Porcelain Veneers
cosmetic.service3.desc: Custom veneers for a perfect, harmonious smile.
cosmetic.service4.title: Whitening
cosmetic.service4.desc: Restore your smile's brilliance with our professional treatment.
beforeafter.title: See the difference
beforeafter.subtitle: Discover the transformations achieved by our team.
testimonials.title: What our patients say
testimonials.quote1: "Exceptional service! The team is warm and professional. I highly recommend this clinic to anyone looking for a trustworthy dentist."
testimonials.quote2: "Excellent whitening experience. Results beyond my expectations! Dr. Ouahnich took the time to explain everything."
testimonials.quote3: "The best dental clinic I've visited. Modern and relaxing environment. Quick appointments and attentive team."

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our services.
faq.a1: Yes! We warmly welcome new patients of all ages. Book an appointment online or call us directly.
faq.a2: We accept most private dental insurance plans. We can submit your claims electronically for faster reimbursement. Contact us to verify your coverage.
faq.a3: Absolutely. We reserve time slots every day for dental emergencies. Call us at 514 767 2254 and we'll see you as soon as possible.
faq.a4: Yes, professional whitening supervised by a dentist is completely safe. We use professional-grade products that protect enamel while delivering optimal results.
faq.q5: How long does Invisalign treatment take?
faq.a5: Duration varies by case, typically between 6 and 18 months. During your consultation, we'll provide a personalized treatment plan with a precise estimate.
insurance.title: We make payments easy
insurance.desc: We accept most private dental insurance plans and offer electronic claims submission for faster reimbursement.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.effective: Effective date: November 6, 2024 — Last updated: November 6, 2024
privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes the policies of Sud Ouest Dental Clinic, located at 1825 Avenue de l'Église, Montréal, QC, H4E 1G9, Canada (email: info@sudouestdentaire.ca, phone: 514 767 2254), regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of your information when you use our website (the "Service").
privacy.consent: By accessing or using the Service, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your information in accordance with this privacy policy. If you do not consent, please do not access or use the Service.
privacy.changes: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time, without notice, and will post the revised policy on the Service. The revised policy will be effective 180 days after posting. Your continued access or use of the Service after this period will constitute your acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.info_desc: When you use our Service, we may collect the following types of information:
privacy.info_1: Information you provide directly (name, email, phone number) through our contact form
privacy.info_2: Technical information collected automatically (IP address, browser type, pages visited)
privacy.info_3: Information collected through cookies and similar technologies (see our Cookie Policy)
privacy.use_desc: We will use the information we collect about you for the following purposes:
privacy.use_1: Responding to your inquiries and communications
privacy.use_3: Ensuring the security and proper functioning of the Service
privacy.use_consent: If we wish to use your information for other purposes, we will ask for your prior consent and will only use your information after obtaining it, unless the law requires us to act otherwise.
privacy.rights_desc: Under applicable laws, including Quebec's Law 25 and the Personal Information Protection Act, you may have the right to:
privacy.rights_1: Access your personal data and obtain a copy
privacy.rights_2: Rectify or delete your personal data
privacy.rights_3: Restrict or object to the processing of your data
privacy.rights_4: Request the transfer (portability) of your data to another entity
privacy.rights_5: Withdraw any consent you have given us
privacy.rights_6: File a complaint with the Commission d'accès à l'information du Québec
privacy.rights_contact: To exercise these rights, you may write to us at info@sudouestdentaire.ca. We will respond to your request in accordance with applicable law.
privacy.security_desc: The security of your information is important to us. We implement reasonable security measures to prevent the loss, misuse, or unauthorized modification of your information. However, no data transmission over the Internet is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.third_desc: Our Service may contain links to other websites not operated by us (including DocClik for appointment booking). This privacy policy does not apply to third-party privacy practices. We encourage you to review the privacy policy of each site you visit.
privacy.cookies_desc: To learn more about our use of cookies and tracking technologies, please see our Cookie Policy.
privacy.contact_desc: If you have any questions or concerns about the processing of your information, you may contact our officer at:
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.effective: Effective date: November 7, 2024 — Last updated: November 7, 2024
cookies.what_desc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site function properly, improve security, provide a better user experience, and analyze site performance.
cookies.how_desc: Our website uses first-party and third-party cookies. First-party cookies are necessary for the site to function properly and do not collect any personally identifiable data. Third-party cookies are primarily used to understand how the site works and how you interact with it.
cookies.necessary_desc: These cookies are essential to the basic functioning of the site. Without them, certain features would not be available. They do not store any personally identifiable data.
cookies.necessary_1: Language preferences — Remembers your language choice (French or English) for future visits. Duration: 1 year.
cookies.necessary_2: Cookie consent — Records your consent preferences to respect them on future visits. Duration: 1 year.
cookies.functional_desc: These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalization of your experience on the site.
cookies.analytics_desc: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the site by collecting anonymous data on pages visited, visit duration, and traffic sources.
cookies.manage_desc: You can change your cookie preferences at any time. Additionally, most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. Here's how to manage cookies in the main browsers:
cookies.contact_desc: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please don't hesitate to contact us:
cookies.also_see: Also see our Privacy Policy to learn more about the protection of your personal data.
why.title: Excellence at your service
why.feature1_desc: State-of-the-art digital technology for precise diagnostics and optimal treatments.
why.feature2_desc: Warm service in French and English for your comfort.
why.feature3_desc: Time slots reserved every day for dental emergencies.
journey.title: As easy as 1, 2, 3
journey.step1_desc: Schedule your appointment online or by phone in seconds.
journey.step2_desc: Enjoy a warm welcome and personalized care.
journey.step3_desc: Leave with a radiant smile and renewed confidence.
cookies.banner_text: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing, you accept our cookie policy.
